configurePresets.name: _base
configurePresets.description: Shared base: Ninja generator, vcpkg toolchain, exported compile_commands.json, and a single vcpkg install tree at build/_vcpkg_installed shared across every preset that inherits this one. Sharing is safe only while every inheriting preset uses the same triplet (arm64-osx today) with no ABI-affecting flags. The asan preset (S1-02) shares this tree because ASan and UBSan are ABI-compatible with non-instrumented static libraries; a future tsan preset (S1-03) must give itself its own _vcpkg_installed_<variant> path because TSan does require every translation unit to be instrumented.

configurePresets.name: debug
configurePresets.description: Debug build: -g, no optimization. Day-to-day development.

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Release build: -O3 -DNDEBUG. Shipping and performance benchmarks.

configurePresets.name: tidy
configurePresets.description: Debug build that runs clang-tidy on every compilation unit (NFR-8 static-analysis gate). Check set and suppressions configured in S0-06.

configurePresets.name: asan
configurePresets.description: Debug build with ASan + UBSan. Wired into CI by S1-02. `-fno-sanitize-recover=undefined` turns every UBSan finding into an abort so the CI step fails; ASan already aborts by default. Inherits the _base vcpkg install tree — see that preset's description for the ABI-compatibility note.
